sections.content:
Good progress! 8 green blocks collected so far (4+4), bar at 6 purple pixels. No game over. 6 green blocks remaining. Let me continue the pattern: collect remaining 6 greens, interleaving with dot clicks. I have 7 dots remaining (9 total - 2 used).
Remaining greens: (34, 22), (34, 28), (34, 34), (34, 40), (34, 46), (34, 52)
Let me collect 4 more greens, then 1 dot, then the last 2 greens.
